name: AI Video Editor
description: Core timeline-based editing workspace for AI-generated video projects. Combines multi-track timeline, scene storyboard, and render queue for end-to-end video production.

page_briefs.editor: Three-region editing workspace. Top area shows a scene storyboard grid of 16:9 scene cards with drag-to-reorder, each displaying thumbnail, duration badge, and scene number. Center area is a multi-track timeline with draggable scrubber handle, frame thumbnails, audio waveforms, scene markers, and zoom controls. Right aside shows a compact render queue with active jobs, progress bars, and status chips. Main content flex-grows so the timeline stays anchored near the bottom of the viewport.
page_briefs.project-detail: Project overview with storyboard grid on left occupying majority of width, showing all scenes with selected-scene script notes in a right sidebar. Below the storyboard, a character sheet grid displays cast members with portrait, name, role, and consistency score. A shot grid flows horizontally showing shot thumbnails with shot-number badges, camera angle icons, and connection arrows indicating narrative order.
page_briefs.export: Two-region export configuration. Upper region is a grouped form with sections for resolution, codec, bitrate, aspect ratio, format, and output destination; each section has clear labels, numeric inputs, and dropdowns with save and reset actions. Lower region shows the render queue as a full list with job rows: scene name, duration, progress bar, ETA, and cancel/retry actions.

shells.sidebar-aside: Collapsible sidebar with main content area and optional right aside panel
